security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' imgsrv: http://imgsrv.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com

bundle.shortDescription: A fast, lightweight personal image viewer
bundle.longDescription: glasspane is an explorer-style image viewer that treats .zip/.cbz archives like folders, views WebP/AVIF natively, and keeps a virtualized thumbnail grid smooth on folders with thousands of images.
